calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)
